# Engineering Standards

Follow the engineering standard defined in [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) at the repository root, and load the per-domain deep-dive under `skills/engineering-standards/reference/<domain>.md` when relevant.

Apply its Universal Laws to all code you write, review, refactor, or design — silently, without narrating the rules. The priority order is fixed: Correct → Clear → Simple → Maintainable → Fast.

When a task touches a specific domain, open and apply the matching deep-dive file under skills/engineering-standards/reference/:
architecture, paradigms, algorithms, backend, data, concurrency, frontend, mobile, cloud, systems, security, testing, git-craft.

Before calling work done, pass the Review Gate in AGENTS.md.
